name: observability
description: Groupon's full observability stack: Telegraf → CLAM → Thanos metrics pipeline, ELK/EFK logging stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana, Filebeat), Grafana dashboards and alerting, APM, Kafka metrics pipeline, TPM cardinality management. Covers both Conveyor Cluster and Metrics Projects on GCP.
author: zero-click workspace
